title: s3 driver Buckety parameters
description: Schema for Buckety.spec.parameters when the resolved driver is s3. v1alpha1 has no common-shape parameters; capability-gated parameters are honoured only when the backend declares the matching implementation discriminator.

jurisdiction.description: Cloudflare R2 data jurisdiction. Capability-gated: accepted only when the backend's config declares implementation: r2; admission rejects on any other implementation. Set at bucket creation, immutable post-create.
